title: Actions & Java
description: Actions and Stuff, but on java 🍉, bringing new animations, textures and visual effects, which makes your world more alive 🍃 0.5.9 OUT NOW! 🔆
body:
![Banner with the text: Actions & Java](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7aefdfa47c8fe2b08bc764f832e1173a7b579c8.png)

### ❗NEW:❗

**Check out my [Update Board](https://roasted-thrush-6dc.notion.site/66a6fddf39b343cd958c2e62689a87e1?v=3c61c8c9acd44ae294fc7858bc27dd74) (might be messed up)**
# 🍉 Actions & Java 🍉

⛏️ Actions & Java is a **lightweight**, **content packed modpack** made to recreate the full **Actions & Stuff + Realistic Biomes** experience on Java, without directly stealing it. You can **easily configure** this modpack via unlinking the modpack in the modrinth app allowing you to **add your own mods or resourcepacks**, or even remove some mods or resourcepacks you don't like.

🌸 Actions & Java features popular mods like [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items), which adds new first player animations, [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) for mob animations, [Fresh Animations: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension) that enhances the player animations, [Resprited](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/resprited_infernalizard) for the smooth and beautiful new textures, [Weskerson's 3D Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tools-and-utils) for 3D item models and more.

🪄 If you **don't like** the **custom textures**, turn off **Resprited** (both) and **Allure x Fresh Animation** from the resource pack list and your **vanilla textures** will be **back**, or turn off any resource pack or mod you don't like!

🌟 Actions & Java includes new **animation** for both **third person** and **first person**, **mob animations**, new **visual effects**, **3d items** and more, check below for the features Actions & Java offer. Check the **gallery for images**!

## 📱 Features
- ### ✨ Fresher Animations
- ### 💧 Better Visual Effects
- ### 🎨 Beautiful New Textures
- ### 🦴 3D Item Models
- ### 🪶 Lightweight
- ### ⚙️ Easily Configurable
- ### 🌱 Always Up-to-date and Uses Trustable Content
